CustomField.description: This field shows the total of all approved payable amounts linked to the Security Deposit record. It is system-calculated by adding up the payable amounts from every payable that is created and approved for this Security Deposit. The value updates automatically whenever an associated payable is approved. [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: No needs to do load, because this field automatically populates after Payable approval.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the total of 'Payable Amount' for approved payables associated with this security deposit. System calculated.
CustomField.label: Total Payable Amount
